question: Preparation Resources
answer:
1. [ML Engineer Interview Course](https://www.tryexponent.com/courses/ml-engineer?ref=zjgwmje&tap_s=5026306-8f044e) 1. [All of Statistics: A Concise Course in Statistical Inference](https://amzn.to/3r87WGa) by Larry Wasserman 2. [Machine Learning](https://amzn.to/3RdiFK3) by Tom Mitchell 3.
